title: dryopteris rigescens
intro: Dryopteris rigescens, also known as the stiff-leaved wood fern, is a species of fern native to North America. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dryopteris rigescens include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Dryopteris rigescens can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make infusions and salves for topical applications.
